style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacing=10;fontSize=11;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#879196;dashed=1;" value="<b>Data model — ExamItems</b><br>PK = ITEM#{id} · SK = METADATA | VERSION#{n}<br>GSI1: SUBJECT#{subject} → {status}#{created}<br>INCLUDE projection — summaries only, no content<br><br><b>Write semantics</b><br>All writes: TransactWriteItems (item + version snapshot)<br>PUT honors If-Match → 409 on version conflict<br><br><b>Runtime</b><br>Lambdas: Node.js 22 · arm64 · X-Ray Active" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="190" width="380" x="940" y="900" div.div:
Data model — ExamItems
PK = ITEM#{id} · SK = METADATA | VERSION#{n}
GSI1: SUBJECT#{subject} → {status}#{created}
INCLUDE projection — summaries only, no content
Write semantics
All writes: TransactWriteItems (item + version snapshot)
PUT honors If-Match → 409 on version conflict
Runtime
Lambdas: Node.js 22 · arm64 · X-Ray Active
